line: # A hardened, templated telemetry gateway with deployment-tool extensions.
# The X-* sections are ignored by systemd and consumed by the release manager.
; This comment style remains valid for compatibility with older unit files.
# Runtime identity and environment are intentionally instance-aware.
; Lifecycle commands use every specialized Exec directive and several prefixes.

line: # The sandbox permits only the gateway's network and file duties.
# Resource values cover plain numbers, sizes, infinity, and compound spans.
# The release manager emits these values into the companion timer.
; Imported names below remain solely to diagnose deprecated configurations.
